---
name: Documentation Update
about: Propose an improvement to documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Document

Specify the file or section that needs updating (e.g., `docs/onboarding.md`, `guilds/web/README.md`).

## Current Content

Describe the current state of the documentation, or quote the specific section that needs improvement.

## Proposed Change

Describe the improvement or correction you would like to see.

## Reason

Explain why this change is needed (e.g., outdated information, unclear instructions, missing context).

## Additional Context

Any references, links, or examples that support the proposed change.
